description: For students who have just graduated and have limited professional experience. Emphasises academic achievements, transferable skills, and enthusiasm.

examples.title: Recent Graduate Application for Junior Accountant
examples.body:
12 August 2026

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Junior Accountant position at your firm. I recently graduated from the University of Zambia with a Bachelor of Accountancy, and I am eager to begin my accounting career in a professional environment where I can apply my knowledge and continue learning.

My academic record reflects both competence and dedication. I achieved an upper second-class honours degree with a GPA of 3.5, and I excelled in courses including financial accounting, auditing, taxation, and management accounting. I was particularly drawn to forensic accounting, where I completed a case study on detecting financial statement fraud that received distinction marks.

Although I am a recent graduate, I have sought every opportunity to gain practical experience. During my second year, I volunteered to maintain the financial records for a student organisation, processing income and expenses, reconciling bank statements, and preparing monthly reports. I also completed a short course in QuickBooks and Sage Pastel, giving me hands-on experience with accounting software.

I am a detail-oriented, honest, and hardworking person who understands the importance of accuracy in financial work. I am prepared to start at the entry level, learn from experienced accountants, and grow into a trusted member of your team.

I would welcome the opportunity to discuss how I can contribute to your firm.

Yours sincerely,

Stella Mwansa

examples.title: Fresh Graduate Cover Letter for Marketing Assistant
examples.body:
5 September 2026

Dear Recruitment Team,

I am a recent graduate from Mulungushi University with a Bachelor of Arts in Marketing, and I am excited to apply for the Marketing Assistant position at your company.

Throughout my degree, I developed a strong foundation in consumer behaviour, brand management, digital marketing, and market research. My dissertation examined the influence of social media marketing on purchasing decisions among Zambian youth, and I used quantitative methods including surveys and statistical analysis to test my hypotheses. The research was well-received by my supervisors and gave me practical experience in designing studies, collecting data, and interpreting results.

I have also built practical skills outside the classroom. I managed the Instagram account for a campus fashion business, increasing followers from 200 to 1,200 in four months through consistent content, engagement strategies, and collaboration with student influencers. I created content calendars, designed graphics using Canva, and analysed metrics to identify the best posting times and content types.

I am proficient in Microsoft Office, Canva, Meta Business Suite, and Google Analytics. I am a fast learner who is eager to master new tools and platforms. I am also a strong writer and communicator, skills that I believe are essential in marketing.

I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to your marketing efforts while learning from your experienced team.

Best regards,

Linda Sichone

examples.title: New Graduate Application for Research Assistant
examples.body:
20 October 2026

Dear Dr. Musonda,

I am writing to apply for the Research Assistant position in your department. I graduated from the University of Zambia in June 2026 with a Bachelor of Science in Biological Sciences, and I am passionate about contributing to scientific research in Zambia.

My academic training has equipped me with strong research fundamentals. I have experience in experimental design, data collection, statistical analysis using SPSS and R, and scientific writing. For my final year project, I investigated the antibacterial properties of three traditional medicinal plants used in Eastern Province. I designed the experiments, collected and analysed data, and wrote a 12,000-word dissertation that earned a distinction.

Beyond technical skills, I have developed the personal qualities essential for research work. I am patient, methodical, and comfortable with repetitive tasks because I understand that rigorous science requires attention to detail. I am also an excellent note-taker and documenter, which ensures that experiments are reproducible and findings are traceable.

I am particularly interested in your research on sustainable agriculture and indigenous crop varieties. I believe that agricultural research has the power to improve food security and livelihoods in rural Zambia, and I want to be part of that work.

I am available to start immediately and willing to work flexible hours to accommodate fieldwork schedules.

Yours sincerely,

Nchimunya Mwale
